meta.title: Senator Bill Cassidy and John Penrose MP on Transatlantic Initiatives Curtailing Illicit Finance
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a conversation with Senator Bill Cassidy and John Penrose MP on the transatlantic efforts to counter illicit finance. The discussion will be moderated by Hudson Research Fellow Nate Sibley.
